impact: Advances the PP&D guardrail plan by proving FCC wireless draft review remains preview-only by default and blocks upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, and inspection scheduling unless the current session provides the exact confirmation phrase for that exact action.
summary: Add fixture-backed DevHub FCC wireless application guardrail tests for draft preview versus official actions requiring exact session-specific confirmation.
target_task: Task checkbox-118: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving FCC wireless application draft review can produce a preview but cannot perform official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
